indications.text:
AZOPT® is a carbonic anhydrase inhibitor indicated in the treatment of elevated intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients
with ocular hypertension or open-angle glaucoma.

AZOPT® is a carbonic anhydrase inhibitor indicated in the treatment of elevated intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients
with ocular hypertension or open-angle glaucoma.

AZOPT® (brinzolamide ophthalmic suspension) 1% is indicated in the treatment of elevated intraocular
pressure in patients with ocular hypertension or open-angle glaucoma.
